series_metadata.series_title: Request for Transfer of General Appropriation & Re-Allotment of Quarters
series_metadata.series_description: Allows state agencies to transfer funds between appropriation line items. ORC 127.13

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State & audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State & audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
